PageHeader

A comprehensive page-level header component with support for icons, breadcrumbs, metadata, status indicators, context selectors, toolbars, and tab navigation.

PageHeader

Alpha

A comprehensive page-level header component that scales from simple titles to complex multi-section headers with icons, breadcrumbs, metadata, status indicators, context selectors, toolbars, and tab navigation.

View Source → View Storybook →

Live Demo

Dashboard

Welcome to your project dashboard

Content for overview tab

Key Features

Flexible Composition

Use the unified PageHeader or compose individual sub-components for granular control.

Sticky Sections

Title and tabs remain visible while scrolling through page content.

Context Selector

Searchable dropdown for switching between projects or contexts.

Page Info Bar

Display metadata and status indicators with left/right alignment.

Tab Navigation

Horizontal tabs with optional icons and badge counts supporting keyboard navigation.

Size Variants

Three sizes (sm, md, lg) for different layout densities and visual hierarchy.

Architecture

PageHeader is composed of four sub-components that can be used individually or combined through the unified PageHeader component:

PageHeaderTop

Breadcrumbs, title, icon, description, selector, actions

PageHeaderMiddle

Page info bar and toolbar

PageHeaderTabs

Sticky tab navigation bar

PageHeaderBottom

Combined info bar, toolbar, and tabs

Props

PageHeader

Prop Type Default Description
title string - The page title, displayed as a heading
description string - Optional description below the title
icon ReactNode - Icon rendered next to the title
breadcrumbs BreadcrumbItem[] - Breadcrumb navigation items
actions ReactNode - Action buttons rendered on the right side
tabs TabItem[] - Page-level tab navigation items
activeTab string - Currently active tab value
onTabChange (value: string) => void - Callback fired when a tab is clicked
selector object - Context selector dropdown configuration
pageInfo { left?: ReactNode; right?: ReactNode } - Page info bar with metadata (left) and status indicators (right)
toolbar ReactNode - Toolbar content (filters, controls) below the title section
greeting { text: string; name?: string } - Personalized greeting text above the title
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size variant affecting font sizes and spacing
className string - Additional CSS classes for the root element

Sub-components

PageHeaderTop

Prop Type Default Description
title string - Page title
description string - Optional description
icon ReactNode - Title icon
breadcrumbs BreadcrumbItem[] - Breadcrumb navigation
actions ReactNode - Action buttons
selector object - Context selector
greeting GreetingConfig - Personalized greeting
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size variant

PageHeaderMiddle

Prop Type Default Description
pageInfo { left?: ReactNode; right?: ReactNode } - Page info bar
toolbar ReactNode - Toolbar content
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size variant

PageHeaderTabs

Prop Type Default Description
tabs TabItem[] - Tab items with label, value, icon, badge
activeTab string - Active tab value
onTabChange (value: string) => void - Tab change callback
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size variant

PageHeaderBottom

Prop Type Default Description
pageInfo { left?: ReactNode; right?: ReactNode } - Page info bar
toolbar ReactNode - Toolbar content
tabs TabItem[] - Tab navigation
activeTab string - Active tab value
onTabChange (value: string) => void - Tab change callback
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size variant

Usage

Basic Usage

import { PageHeader } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function DashboardHeader() {
  return (
    <PageHeader
      title="Dashboard"
      description="Welcome to your dashboard"
      icon={<BarChart3 className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-500" />}
      actions={
        <button className="px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md bg-orange-500 text-white">
          Create
        </button>
      }
    />
  );
}

With Tabs and Breadcrumbs

import { useState } from 'react';
import { PageHeader } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function ProjectHeader() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview');

  const tabs = [
    { label: 'Overview', value: 'overview', badge: 12 },
    { label: 'Settings', value: 'settings' },
    { label: 'Activity', value: 'activity', badge: 5 },
  ];

  return (
    <PageHeader
      title="Project Settings"
      breadcrumbs={[
        { label: 'Projects', href: '/projects' },
        { label: 'Current Project' },
      ]}
      tabs={tabs}
      activeTab={activeTab}
      onTabChange={setActiveTab}
    />
  );
}

With Context Selector

import { PageHeader } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function EngineHeader() {
  return (
    <PageHeader
      title="Story Engine"
      icon={<Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-500" />}
      selector={{
        currentItem: { id: '1', label: 'Project Alpha', metadata: '3 stories' },
        items: [
          { id: '1', label: 'Project Alpha', metadata: '3 stories' },
          { id: '2', label: 'Project Beta', metadata: '7 stories' },
        ],
        onSelect: (item) => console.log(item),
        searchable: true,
      }}
    />
  );
}

Using Sub-components

import {
  PageHeaderTop,
  PageHeaderMiddle,
  PageHeaderTabs,
  PageHeaderBottom,
} from '@storyhouse/components';

export function CustomHeader() {
  return (
    <div>
      <PageHeaderTop
        title="Custom Layout"
        description="Fine-grained control"
        actions={<button className="...">Save</button>}
      />
      <PageHeaderMiddle
        pageInfo={{ left: <span>Last updated: today</span> }}
      />
      <PageHeaderBottom
        tabs={[{ label: 'Tab 1', value: '1' }, { label: 'Tab 2', value: '2' }]}
        activeTab="1"
      />
    </div>
  );
}

Edge Cases & Accessibility

  • Breadcrumb navigation — Uses nav element with aria-label="Breadcrumb" for screen reader identification.
  • Tab navigation — Tabs use role="tablist" with aria-selected and aria-current for accessibility. Focus-visible ring for keyboard users.
  • Empty state — PageHeaderMiddle and PageHeaderTabs return null when no content is provided.
  • Selector dropdown — Uses aria-haspopup="listbox" and aria-expanded for screen readers; closes on outside click.
  • Responsive — Header sections wrap gracefully on small screens with flex-wrap.
  • Backwards compatibility — Deprecated metadata/status props still work but pageInfo is recommended.
  • Compound components — PageHeader.Metadata, PageHeader.MetadataBadge, PageHeader.MetadataText, and PageHeader.Status are available as static properties.
PageHeader Component
